name: pdfcry
description: Extract and read text content from PDF files. Supports full text dump, metadata inspection, page count, and piping content into the AI pipeline.
author: CVAKI

commands.brief: Extract and print all readable text from a PDF file
commands.description: Opens the PDF at <filepath> and extracts all readable text content page by page.

commands.brief: Show PDF metadata: title, author, page count, creation date
commands.description: Reads and displays the metadata block of the PDF without extracting full text.

commands.brief: Extract PDF text and send it directly to the AI model for analysis
commands.description: Extracts PDF content and appends your question, then forwards both to whyWhale's active AI model.
